caption:
The lecture hall emptied, but my desk remained a stage. 🎭 Tonight was different, the private tutor session was supposed to be academic, but electricity crackled in the air between us. 🧪 I adjusted my blouse, the silk brushing against my skin, feeling the weight of the tailored blazer I wore. Every button was a promise kept, yet every glance hinted at what lay beneath. He leaned in, the scent of old books and expensive cologne mixing in the quiet room. My fingers traced the page, but our eyes stayed locked, the silence louder than a roar. The lesson wasn't about the textbook anymore. 📚💦

#UniversitySecrets #TeacherLife #Curves #LateNightStudy #AcademicRomance
